title: [CI:DOCS] manpage xref: helpful diagnostic for unescaped dash-dash
body:
PR #9856 works around a buggy markdown processor that cleverly
converts double dashes to em-dash. The unfortunate result is
that the man page source files are unmaintainable, because
every '--foo' has to be specified as '\-\-foo'. This is
impossible for humans to remember, so let's add a helpful
diagnostic message when we detect new options added without
the escapes.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *edsantiago* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [edsantiago] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

For posterity: my brief WIP involved me trying to find a workaround for duplicate warnings:
```
xref-helpmsgs-manpages: docs/source/markdown/podman-attach.1.md:21: You probably need to backslash-escape '--detach' as '\-\-detach'
xref-helpmsgs-manpages: docs/source/markdown/podman-attach.1.md:21: You probably need to backslash-escape '--detach' as '\-\-detach'
xref-helpmsgs-manpages: podman attach --help lists --detach-keys, but --detach-keys not in docs/source/markdown/podman-attach.1.md
xref-helpmsgs-manpages: podman container attach --help lists --detach-keys, but --detach-keys not in docs/source/markdown/podman-attach.1.md
```
I find it irritating, slightly confusing, but ultimately I decided that fixing it is not worth the added code complexity. I think developers seeing that message will understand what to do. (And possibly cuss me out for making them look twice.)
